title: Failed to connect to PostgreSQL database from n8n
symptom: n8n fails to test the connection to the PostgreSQL database, resulting in an error. The connection works fine when tested outside of n8n.
not_this_if: Connection works in other environments like terminal or Python
root_cause: n8n requires the correct host configuration to connect to the PostgreSQL database. Using the public IP or local IP instead of the container name can lead to connection failures due to network isolation in Docker.
fix_steps: Open the PostgreSQL node settings in n8n
Change the host to the container name of the PostgreSQL service
agent_instruction: Set the PostgreSQL host to the container name in the node settings.
